text.title: Marketing Tool Stack Rationalization Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Always start at root-question; conclusions reference rule ids.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the AGENTS.md applicability preconditions hold for this case?

conclusion.verdict: too small to rationalize; track manually
complete the inventory (SSO + finance + Slack + bookmarks); do not score yet

branch.when: stack_size >= 5 AND inventory_complete == true AND usage_evidence == 'self_reported'

conclusion.verdict: pull admin-log evidence per tool before scoring

branch.when: stack_size >= 5 AND inventory_complete == true AND usage_evidence == 'audit_log'

conclusion.verdict: score, categorize, ship report with 30-day execution checklist

example.trace: stack_size >= 5 AND inventory_complete == true AND usage_evidence == 'audit_log' → conclusion ref="execution-checklist-required" verdict="score, categorize, ship report with 30-day execution checklist"

text.example: Reading: evaluate the named observable; follow the matching branch; apply the rule the conclusion references.
